metadata.note: Evidence index uses source/confidence labels. Items link to existing local summaries and official source hubs when exact PDFs need independent verification.

flight.title: Flight Logs and Manifests
flight.excerpt: Flight evidence is linked to local flight-record analysis and official DOJ release hubs for independent verification. Passenger presence is not, by itself, proof of wrongdoing.

flight.title: Pilot Testimony Context
flight.excerpt: Pilot testimony is used to contextualize aircraft operations, routes, and known passengers while separating documented travel from allegations.

phone.title: Phone and Contact Records
phone.excerpt: Phone/contact records are summarized with caution: contact frequency may support investigative context but requires source-specific interpretation.

phone.title: Black Book / Contact Lists
phone.excerpt: Contact lists establish entries and associations, not criminal culpability. Cards and dossiers should label no-allegation status where applicable.

testimony.title: Victim Testimony Summary
testimony.excerpt: Victim testimony is treated as core evidence where present in court or DOJ records, with privacy-preserving redactions retained.

testimony.title: Maxwell Proffer and Related Records
testimony.excerpt: Maxwell-related records are separated from broader inference and linked to DOJ disclosure categories for verification.

financial.title: Financial Records and Corporate Entities
financial.excerpt: Financial records are organized around documented entities, payments, and asset structures; allegation status is kept separate from corporate-record presence.

financial.title: Corporate Entity Appendix
financial.excerpt: Static appendix for entity names, roles, and research notes. Use as an index into official records rather than a standalone proof layer.

physical.title: Search Warrant and Physical Evidence Summaries
physical.excerpt: Physical-evidence summaries link to local records and official release hubs. Sensitive material descriptions remain high-level.

physical.title: FBI FOIA Files
physical.excerpt: DOJ-hosted FBI FOIA PDFs are indexed as primary public-record sources. The browser links out instead of mirroring sensitive files.
